contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 150
- Description: Phase 1 — Chocolate Subscription Engine (Subscribe + PDPs)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/157
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/158
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/159
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/160
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/161
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/162
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/163
  
  Details:
  ## Phase 1 — Chocolate Subscription Engine
  
  Built and shipped the complete subscribe-to-chocolate-bar flow on agroverse.shop.
  
  ### What was built
  
  - **Subscribe page** at `/subscribe/chocolate-bar/` — quantity picker (3/6/12 presets + stepper), address form, Stripe Checkout integration with recurring monthly pricing
  - **GAS action** — `createSubscriptionCheckoutSession` (additive, doesn't touch existing cart flow)
  - **Checkout success page**
  - **Nav link** to subscribe page
  - **Subscribe CTA** on Oscar's Bar PDP and Santa Ana Bar PDP
  - **Generic PDP** at `/product-page/premium-dark-chocolate-bar/` — full subscription landing page with rotating-origins concept, traceability, impact section
  - **Homepage product card** for the generic PDP
  - **Tagline:** "Life is like a box of chocolates — you never know what farm you're gonna get."
  - **Layout polish:** hero two-column, content full-width below
  - **Removed** competing "Buy One Bar" CTA from generic PDP
  
  ### PRs merged (agroverse_shop_beta)
  - PR #157 — Subscribe CTA on Oscar's + Santa Ana PDPs + generic PDP
  - PR #158 — Homepage subscribe card
  - PR #159 — Tagline
  - PR #160 — Full-width layout (reverted)
  - PR #161 — Revert to two-column
  - PR #162 — Restructure layout
  - PR #163 — Remove Buy One Bar button
  
  Plus earlier PRs from the initial build (subscribe page, GAS action, success page, nav link).
  
  ### Time spent
  ~2.5 hours total across all work.
  
  ### Phase 2 deferred
  Fulfillment automation (queue + invoice.paid handler + fulfillment UI) deferred until Linda has received 2 successful subscription shipments. Follow-up filed in OPEN_FOLLOWUPS.md with 60-day timer.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh, Sophia Truesight
- TDG Issued: 250
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
